description: We will deliver your new vehicle straight to your driveway, fast, easy, and hassle free! From our showroom floor to your front door, we make car buying simple and convenient. Our team brings your new ride directly to you, cleaned, fueled, and ready for the road. Experience car buying the way it should be, personal, stress free, and delivered right to your driveway. At Lemans Chevy City, we are not just selling vehicles, we are delivering smiles, one driveway at a time.  This 2026 Chevrolet Traverse LT 1LT is an exceptional choice for the modern family. Boasting a sleek gray exterior and a spacious, well-appointed interior, this Traverse is designed to accommodate your every need. With its powerful 2.5L DOHC engine and 8-speed automatic transmission, you'll enjoy a smooth and efficient driving experience, whether navigating city streets or embarking on long-distance adventures.   Driver Confidence Package  Floor Liner Package  Molded Splash Guards  Black Bowtie  The Traverse LT 1LT comes equipped with a host of advanced features to enhance your driving experience. Enjoy the convenience of the hands-free power liftgate, the enhanced visibility of the HD Surround Vision system, and the added safety of the Rear Pedestrian Alert. Stay connected with the intuitive infotainment system, complete with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration.  Comfort and convenience are at the forefront of this Traverse. Sink into the premium cloth-trimmed seats, which offer both heating and power adjustability for the driver. The dual-zone automatic climate control system ensures everyone on board can enjoy their ideal temperature. And with the available 120V power outlet, you can power your devices on the go.  Designed with families in mind, the Traverse LT 1LT offers ample cargo space and versatile seating configurations. Whether you need to transport sports equipment, camping gear, or the whole family, this SUV has the flexibility to accommodate your needs. The integrated cargo liner and all-weather floor liners keep your interior protected from the elements.  Experience the perfect blend of style, technology, and capability in the 2026 Chevrolet Traverse LT 1LT. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate how this exceptional vehicle can enhance your daily driving and weekend adventures. [!@@ NL @@!][!@@ NL @@!]NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:[!@@ NL @@!][!@@ NL @@!][!@@ NL @@!][!@@ NL @@!]Convenience Distance pacing cruise control - Set it and forget it.  Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.  Now, with Distance pacing cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.   Distance pacing cruise control; your ultimate co-pilot.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. At ONYX Automotive, we're here to Serve you! Vehicle History..See dealer for details..What the reviews say..The QX60 just got a new engine last year, but Infiniti wasn't done updating its midsize SUV. For 2026, the QX60 gets an exterior refresh that takes cues from the recently redesigned QX80. The revised grille is more angular and features an illuminated Infiniti emblem. The headlights and taillights have also been restyled, with daytime running lights featuring LED technology and segmented into separate elements. In addition to the new look, the 2026 QX60 gets a new 12.3-inch touchscreen infotainment system running Google Built-In infotainment and navigation, which is standard across the lineup along with a matching 12.3-inch instrument display. The new system also now supports wireless Android Auto alongside wireless Apple CarPlay. The QX60's available premium audio systems, which used to wear Bose branding, are now supplied by high-end speaker maker Klipsch. How comfortable is the INFINITI QX60? One of the hallmarks of a luxury SUV is a quiet interior and the QX60 certainly delivers. The QX60's climate control is another strength. The system is easy to understand and operate, and it features roof-mounted air vents for second- and third-row passengers for better airflow. OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:  Preferred Equipment Group 4SB    Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:  Preferred Equipment Group 5SB    Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot. Powered by a 2.5L GDI 4-cylinder engine and an 8-speed automatic transmission, it features All-Wheel Drive with Terrain Mode and Drive Mode Select for versatile performance. Inside, a 12.3" touchscreen offers wireless Android Auto and Apple CarPlay, paired with a Harman/Kardon premium audio system and integrated navigation. The X-Line Premium and Technology Packages add a panoramic sunroof, smart power liftgate, LED interior lighting, and a 12.3" digital instrument cluster. Advanced safety and driver-assistance features include Smart Cruise Control with Stop & Go, Blind-Spot View Monitor, Surround View Monitor, and Highway Driving Assist. Heated SynTex seats, dual-zone climate control, and wireless charging enhance everyday comfort, while rugged 19" alloy wheels and roof rails complete its bold exterior.  This Kia Certified Pre-Owned vehicle has earned its certification by meeting Kias strict quality and reliability standards. Each CPO Kia undergoes a comprehensive inspection by factory-trained technicians and must pass rigorous requirements before being approved for sale.   Certification means added confidence with factory-backed warranty coverage and roadside assistance, giving you protection well beyond a typical used vehicle. A Kia Certified Pre-Owned vehicle delivers dependable performance, long-term reliability, and peace of mindmaking it a smart, worry-free choice. description: Experience the Exhilaration of the 2026 Hyundai Kona SEL Sport  Prepare to be captivated by the striking 2026 Hyundai Kona SEL Sport. Adorned in the eye-catching Soultronic Orange Pearl exterior, this Kona commands attention wherever it goes. Its bold and dynamic design is complemented by a host of premium features, including all-weather fitted liners, a cargo tray, and carpeted floor mats, ensuring a refined and practical driving experience.  Under the hood, the 2.0L I4 DOHC 16V engine, paired with a seamless CVT transmission and front-wheel drive, delivers an impressive balance of power and efficiency. With an EPA-estimated 28 MPG in the city and 35 MPG on the highway, you'll enjoy exceptional fuel economy without sacrificing driving excitement.  Step inside the well-appointed cabin and you'll be greeted by a wealth of advanced technologies and creature comforts. Enjoy the convenience of Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, the clarity of the AM/FM/SiriusXM/HD Audio System, and the added security of the Rear View Back-Up Camera. Stay comfortable in the heated front seats, with dual-zone automatic climate control ensuring a personalized environment for all passengers.  Hyundai's commitment to quality and safety is evident in the Kona's extensive list of advanced features. From the Dual Front Impact Airbags and Electronic Stability Control to the Automatic High-Beam Headlights and Panic Alarm, this SUV is designed to keep you and your loved ones protected on the road.  Experience the exceptional value and peace of mind that comes with a Hyundai Certified Pre-Owned vehicle. This 2026 Kona SEL Sport has been meticulously inspected and backed by Hyundai's industry-leading warranty and roadside assistance program.  Discover the perfect blend of style, performance, and technology in the 2026 Hyundai Kona SEL Sport. description: Porsche North Houston is delighted to showcase, this Certified Pre-Owned 2024 Porsche 911 S/T. Dressed in an evocative Shade Green Metallic and with just 497 miles to its name, this vehicle is a testament to the potent combination of high performance and sophistication that Porsche embodies.   The 911 S/T stands as a beacon of design and performance, its Shade Green Metallic exterior not just a color, but a badge of honor that reflects Porsche's illustrious racing heritage. Adorned with LED-Matrix Design Headlights including Porsche Dynamic Light System Plus (PDLS+) and Exclusive Design Taillights, it commands attention with a unique presence. The Heritage Design Package  60 Years of the 911 and Motorsport Decals amplify its celebratory significance, while the Personal Start Number in Lugano Blue adds a custom touch. The Front Axle Lift System and 23.7-gallon Extended Range Fuel Tank underscore its road-ready versatility.     Step inside and the Heritage Design Leather Interior in Black/Classic Cognac (Semi-Aniline) welcomes you into a cabin of tailored elegance. The Sport Seats Plus (4-way) deliver supportive comfort, while features like Ambient Lighting, Storage Package, and the BOSE Surround Sound System enhance the experience. Details such as the Auto-Dimming Mirrors with Integrated Rain Sensor, ParkAssist (Rear), and Chrono Package round out an interior designed for the driver.    Engine and Performance: At the heart of this mechanical masterpiece is a naturally aspirated 4.0-liter flat-six engine, unleashing an estimated 518 horsepower and 342 lb-ft of torque. This thrilling power is mated to a lightweight 6-speed manual transmissionexclusive to the S/Tdelivering purist engagement and a visceral connection to the road. Weighing in as the lightest of the 992-generation 911s, the S/T combines motorsport DNA with the finesse of a road-going Porsche.     Key Features:     Heritage Design Package  60 Years of the 911:  Celebrates Porsches iconic lineage with retro-inspired detailing and unique badging. description: The 2020 Jeep Wrangler Unlimited Sport S is engineered with a sophisticated 2.0L Twin-Scroll Turbocharged Inline-4 engine, a power plant that prioritizes high power density and thermal efficiency through Direct Fuel Injection and a dedicated Cooled Exhaust Gas Recirculation (C-EGR) system. This engine architecture produces a substantial 295 lb-ft of torque, surpassing the peak torque of the V6 variant and delivering it at a significantly lower RPM range, which optimizes mechanical leverage for both low-speed technical maneuvers and high-load towing. The engine's lightweight aluminum alloy construction, featuring a Double Overhead Camshaft (DOHC) configuration and independent liquid-cooling circuits for the intake air and turbocharger, ensures precise thermal management and reduces rotational inertia for rapid transient response. Structurally, the vehicle is integrated into a fully boxed, high-strength steel chassis utilizing hydroformed sections to achieve maximum torsional rigidity, providing a stable platform for the solid-axle suspension while functioning as a high-integrity safety cell. This safety framework is bolstered by Electronic Roll Mitigation (ERM) and Electronic Stability Control (ESC), which employ high-frequency sensor arrays to monitor yaw rate and lateral acceleration, intervening via differential braking to maintain vehicle equilibrium. Its widespread popularity and industry-leading residual value are driven by this powertrain's superior fuel-to-kinetic energy conversion ratio and the modularity of the JL platform, which offers an unparalleled synthesis of modern thermodynamics and rugged, multi-terrain structural engineering.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Rollover MItigation,Tilt & Telescoping Wheel,Fog Lights,4-Cyl Turbo 2.0 Liter,Traction Control,Backup Camera,AM/FM Stereo,Push Button Start,Power Windows,Power Steering,Alloy Wheels,Uconnect,Automatic 8-Spd,Air Conditioning,Alarm System,Bluetooth Wireless,ABS (4-Wheel),Power Door Locks,Cruise Control,Electronic Stability Control,Keyless Entry,Dual Air Bags,Side Air Bags,4WD,Hill Start Assist Control

description: Discover the perfect blend of style, performance, and technology in this exceptional 2020 Audi A3 2.0T Premium Plus. With its sleek exterior design, powerful engine, and advanced features, this Audi is the ultimate expression of German engineering excellence.  Elevate your driving experience with this A3's impressive list of premium amenities:   Audi Beam-Rings  Audi Parking System Plus  Audi Phone Box with Wireless Charging  Auto-Dimming Interior Mirror with Compass  Bang & Olufsen Sound System  Camera Distance Sensor  Full LED Headlights  Heated Front Bucket Seats  Navigation Package with Audi Connect Online Services and Audi Virtual Cockpit  Power Moonroof  Rear Cross Traffic Assist  Side Assist  Beneath the sculpted hood, the A3's 2.0L 4-cylinder TFSI engine delivers an exhilarating 27 city/36 highway MPG, ensuring you can enjoy the thrill of the drive while maximizing efficiency. The 7-speed S tronic automatic transmission provides seamless gear changes, while the FrontTrak all-wheel-drive system provides exceptional traction and control in any driving condition.  Step inside the A3's spacious and well-appointed cabin, where premium materials and thoughtful design create an environment of refined luxury. The leather-wrapped steering wheel and shift knob, along with the 8-way power-adjustable passenger seat, offer unparalleled comfort and customization. The Audi Virtual Cockpit and MMI Navigation Plus with MMI Touch provide intuitive access to a wealth of information and entertainment, keeping you connected and engaged on every journey.  Safety is also a top priority in the A3, with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies, including Audi Side Assist, Rear Cross Traffic Assist, and the Audi Parking System Plus. These features work together to help you navigate the road with confidence and peace of mind.  Experience the exceptional craftsmanship, performance, and technology of the 2020 Audi A3 2.0T Premium Plus. What this vehicle includes:    ProASSIST Package ($2,200 value)Blind Spot Intervention (BSI)Intelligent Cruise Control (ICC)Lane Departure Prevention (LDP)Smart Rear View Mirror        Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. What this vehicle includes:               Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. description: This 2020 GMC Sierra 1500 with 45,229 miles is Car Bravo Certified, offering the perfect balance of strength, comfort, and modern technology backed by added peace of mind. As a full-size pickup, the Sierra is built to handle work, towing, and everyday driving with confidence while still delivering a refined ride.  Power comes from a capable drivetrain designed for durability and performance, making this Sierra well-suited for hauling, trailering, or weekend projects. Its solid suspension and strong braking system provide a confident feel whether youre on the highway or the job site.  Performance & Capability Highlights  Strong V8 performance (Sierra 1500 platform)  Smooth automatic transmission  Rear-wheel drive with stability and traction control  4-wheel disc brakes with ABS  Excellent towing and payload capability for its class  Safety is a key focus, with features designed to keep you protected and aware on every drive:  Stability Control & Traction Control  Tire Pressure Monitoring System  Full airbag system  Rear vision camera  Driver assistance technologies (trim-dependent)  Inside, the Sierra delivers GMCs signature blend of comfort and practicality:  Spacious crew cab layout  Power-adjustable driver seat  Premium materials and smart storage throughout the cabin  Climate control for year-round comfort  Steering wheelmounted controls  Technology keeps you connected and in control:  Touchscreen infotainment system  Apple CarPlay & Android Auto  Bluetooth connectivity  USB ports and smartphone integration  Backup camera for easier parking and hitching  As a Car Bravo Certified vehicle, this Sierra has passed a comprehensive inspection and includes a 12-month / 12,000-mile warranty, plus roadside assistancegiving you extra confidence in your purchase. description: 2020 Hyundai Elantra SEL Vehicle DescriptionIntroductionThe 2020 Hyundai Elantra SEL is a stylish and versatile compact sedan that delivers a well-rounded blend of comfort, value, and modern features. With its sleek design, thoughtful technology, and efficient performance, the Elantra SEL offers an enjoyable driving experience whether you're commuting, running errands, or heading out on weekend journeys. This trim enhances the Elantra lineup with desirable comfort and convenience features that elevate everyday driving without sacrificing practicality. The 2020 Elantra SEL stands out as a dependable and engaging choice in the compact sedan segment, appealing to drivers who want a dynamic package with smart amenities and efficient performance.PerformanceEngine: 2.0-liter DOHC 4-cylinderHorsepower: 147 hpTorque: 132 lb-ftTransmission: Intelligent Variable Transmission (IVT)Drivetrain: Front-Wheel Drive (FWD)Fuel Economy: Excellent balance of city and highway efficiencySuspension: Well-tuned for comfortable ride qualityThe 2020 Elantra SEL's 2.0-liter four-cylinder engine delivers smooth and efficient power with responsive throttle feel, while the Intelligent Variable Transmission contributes to seamless acceleration and fuel-savvy performance. This combination ensures a comfortable and composed ride whether you're navigating city streets or cruising on the highway. The Elantra's suspension is tuned to offer a refined and controlled ride, absorbing bumps and road imperfections with ease while maintaining confident handling.This performance setup allows the Elantra SEL to provide both spirited responsiveness and everyday practicality. Its balanced performance boosts confidence behind the wheel and delivers a driving experience that feels natural and reliable in a wide range of conditions.Interior & ComfortSeating Capacity: 5 passengersPremium cloth seating with comfortable contoursDual-zone automatic climate controlTilt and telescopic steering column8-inch touchscreen display with intuitive interfaceApple CarPlay and Android Auto integrationBluetooth hands-free connectivity and USB portsAmple headroom and legroom for driver and passengersInside, the 2020 Hyundai Elantra SEL offers a welcoming and comfortable cabin designed for everyday use. The cloth-trimmed seats provide supportive comfort, while dual-zone automatic climate control helps maintain personalized comfort for everyone on board. The intuitive 8-inch touchscreen with smartphone integration keeps you connected and entertained, making it easy to stream music, access navigation, and stay in touch throughout your trip. Thoughtful storage solutions and ergonomic controls contribute to the Elantra's usability and make the interior feel both functional and refined.The cabin's practical layout and quality materials create a comfortable space that enhances every drive  from short errands to longer trips  making occupants feel at ease mile after mile.Dimensions & CapacityWheelbase: Well-balanced for interior comfort and stabilityOverall Length: Designed to maximize cabin and cargo spaceWidth: Comfortable interior width for occupantsHeight: Streamlined profile with good headroomPassenger Capacity: 5 passengersTrunk Volume: Competitive cargo space for luggage and everyday itemsThe 2020 Elantra SEL's thoughtfully engineered dimensions create a spacious and inviting interior while maintaining a sleek exterior profile. Its generous cabin room provides comfortable seating for passengers in both front and rear areas, and the trunk offers ample storage for groceries, luggage, gear, or other daily cargo. The sedan's balanced dimensions make it easy to maneuver in urban and suburban settings without compromising interior comfort.Exterior FeaturesSleek aerodynamic body lines with contemporary design cuesSignature Hyundai front grille with refined trim elementsLED daytime running lightsBody-color power side mirrorsStylish alloy wheels with modern finishClean, modern silhouette with a confident stanceThe 2020 Hyundai Elantra SEL presents a contemporary and appealing exterior that turns heads without being overly bold. Its aerodynamic profile and modern styling details give it a refined look, while features like LED daytime running lights and stylish alloy wheels enhance both appearance and road presence. The overall design reflects a balance of elegance and practicality that suits a wide range of driving styles and preferences.Safety & Driver AssistanceStandard advanced driver-assist featuresForward collision avoidance assistLane keeping assistDriver attention warningBlind-spot collision warningRear cross-traffic alertRearview cameraMultiple airbags with stability and traction controlSafety is a central focus of the Elantra SEL, with a solid suite of technologies designed to help protect you and your passengers on every journey. Whether navigating crowded traffic or cruising on the highway, these systems work together to promote awareness, confidence, and control  helping make each drive more enjoyable and secure for everyone in the vehicle.SummaryThe 2020 Hyundai Elantra SEL is a well-rounded compact sedan that stands out with its blend of efficiency, technology, and everyday comfort. Its efficient yet capable powertrain and smooth ride enhance daily driving, while the thoughtfully designed interior provides comfort and connectivity for all passengers. Modern exterior styling adds visual appeal, and the array of safety features helps support confidence on every route. Whether you're commuting, heading out on a weekend adventure, or simply running errands around town, the Elantra SEL delivers a balanced and enjoyable driving experience. With its practical cargo space, smart features, and comfortable cabin, the 2020 Hyundai Elantra SEL exemplifies what a modern compact sedan should be  capable, comfortable, and ready for whatever's next.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Keyless Entry,Power Steering,SiriusXM Satellite,Air Conditioning,Lane Keep Assist,Electronic Stability Control,Tilt & Telescoping Wheel,Alarm System,Backup Camera,Knee Air Bags,Daytime Running Lights,ABS (4-Wheel),FWD,Traction Control,Power Windows,F&R Head Curtain Air Bags,Alloy Wheels,Hill Start Assist Control,Power Door Locks,Side Air Bags,AM/FM/HD Radio,Automatic IVT,Bluetooth Wireless,Cruise Control,CD/MP3 (Single Disc),4-Cyl 2.0 Liter,Blind-Spot Detection,Dual Air Bags

description: Experience luxury, performance, and advanced technology in this 2020 Mercedes-Benz E-Class E 350 4MATIC AWD Sedan. With its powerful 2.0L Turbo I4 engine paired to a 9-speed shiftable automatic transmission and full-time AWD, you'll enjoy a smooth yet dynamic drive in all conditions. The striking white exterior is complemented by aluminum alloy wheels, LED headlights, and a sleek, modern design. Step inside to find customizable digital displays, a 12.3-inch infotainment screen with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, and a premium leatherette interior with power-adjustable, heated seats and color-adjustable ambient lighting. Safety is paramount with features like front automatic emergency braking, blind spot monitoring, driver attention alert, and crosswind stabilization. Enjoy added convenience from a sensor-activated power trunk, proximity entry, push-button start, and voice-operated navigation. Stay connected with Mercedes Me app compatibility and hotspot-ready Wi-Fi. description: 2023 Volvo C40 Recharge Pure Electric Twin Plus AWD Fjord Blue Metallic Dial the Dealer Direct ...Call Paul, or text 240-731-0977, Drive into the future with this stunning Certified by Volvo 2023 C40 Recharge Twin AWD Plus, finished in the striking and highly sought-after Fjord Blue Metallic. This pure electric luxury crossover is the perfect choice for drivers in Bethesda, MD, and the Washington, DC metro area looking to combine zero-emission efficiency with Volvo's legendary safety. Powered by dual electric motors producing a thrilling 402 HP and 486 lb-ft of torque, this C40 offers exhilarating performance and standard Permanent All-Wheel Drive, ensuring you navigate the Capital Beltway and Rock Creek Parkway with total confidence regardless of the weather., As a Certified Pre-Owned (CPO) vehicle, this C40 Recharge undergoes a rigorous 170-point inspection and comes with a factory-backed 12-month/unlimited-mile warranty that begins after the 4-year/50,000-mile factory warranty expires, with the option to extend up to 10 years. For local commuters, the 78 kWh battery provides a range of approximately 226 miles, making it easy to travel from Silver Spring to Northern Virginia on a single charge. Plus, with DC Fast Charging capability, you can reach an 80% charge in about 37 minutes, perfect for busy professionals in the District, The interior of this "Plus" trim is a masterclass in modern Scandinavian design, featuring a completely leather-free cabin with heated front seats and unique backlit topography translucent deco panels. Tech-savvy drivers will love the Google built-in infotainment system, featuring Google Maps, Assistant, and the Play Store, along with Apple CarPlay and a 12.3-inch digital driver display. Safety is paramount with a 360 Surround View Camera, Blind Spot Information System (BLIS) with Steer Assist, and Collision Avoidance technology that detects pedestrians and cyclistsessential for navigating the dense streets of Bethesda and DC, Luxury meets utility with features like a laminated panoramic roof, power-folding rear headrests, and a removable/folding load floor with a grocery bag holder for those trips to the Bethesda Farmers Market. This vehicle also includes the balance of its 8-year/100,000-mile battery warranty and complimentary roadside assistance. With its sleek coupe-like silhouette and 19-inch alloy wheels, this 2023 C40 Recharge stands out as the premier electric SUV for the eco-conscious luxury buyer.
